mapper.select: SELECT id, item_group, item_code, item_name FROM pr_expense_item WHERE item_code NOT IN ( SELECT item_code FROM pr_house_expense WHERE org_id = #{orgId} AND house_id = (SELECT id FROM pr_house WHERE room_num = #{roomNum} AND org_id = #{orgId} AND del_flag = '0') ) AND org_id = #{orgId} AND item_group != '5' ORDER BY item_group, item_code
